description_long: This sculpture depicts a highly stylized, muscular male figure standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure is rendered in a metallic, bronze-like material with a glossy finish, giving it a striking, reflective appearance. The anatomical details are pronounced, emphasizing the musculature and form of the human body. The sculpture stands atop a round, tiered pedestal that appears to be made of a darker material, possibly wood or painted metal, providing a strong visual contrast to the figure. The overall design is reminiscent of classical heroic statues, but with a modern, almost trophy-like aesthetic. The surface is smooth and polished, with no visible inscriptions or decorative elements beyond the figure itself.
description: A glossy bronze-colored sculpture of a muscular male figure in a T-pose, mounted on a round, dark pedestal. The surface is highly polished and reflective, emphasizing anatomical detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full muscular anatomy, facial features, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back musculature, shoulder blades, and the back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the curvature of the back and legs.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is plain and unadorned.
